description: Baseline RAG regression evaluation cases for the enterprise knowledge service.

expectations.name: respiratory
queries: patient has fever cough sore throat and chest congestion
adult with cough phlegm wheezing and no emergency red flags
persistent cough after cold with mild fever which clinic
respiratory symptoms fever throat pain sputum and mild shortness of breath
cough and asthma like breathing but alert and stable
fever with cough and runny nose needs outpatient department
sore throat cough sputum no chest pain which department

expectations.name: emergency
queries: severe chest pain with trouble breathing now
unconscious patient with convulsions and bleeding
sudden limb weakness and slurred speech
massive bleeding after injury should not book outpatient
severe breathing difficulty and low oxygen
acute chest tightness with fainting

expectations.name: digestive
queries: stomach pain diarrhea vomiting reflux
abdominal pain loose stool nausea no blood
acid reflux bloating poor appetite
diarrhea and vomiting after meal with mild dehydration
stomachache and digestive discomfort without black stool
belly pain vomiting no severe persistent pain

expectations.name: skin
queries: skin rash itching allergy eczema
hives and itchy red skin without breathing problems
acne and skin inflammation which department
localized skin redness swelling and pain
allergic rash but no throat swelling

expectations.name: pediatric
queries: child has fever and cough which clinic
baby diarrhea and rash outpatient department
toddler common cold symptoms
parent asks about infant fever without convulsion
children common illness appointment

expectations.name: gynecology
queries: menstrual abnormality and cramps
vaginal discharge and gynecological inflammation
pregnancy early stage ordinary consultation
pre pregnancy consultation which department
period pain and irregular menstruation

expectations.name: ophthalmology
queries: eye pain red eye and tearing
blurred vision and foreign body feeling
vision decline without chemical injury
red swollen painful eye outpatient
eye discomfort with light sensitivity

expectations.name: neurology
queries: headache dizziness and numbness without stroke signs
migraine outpatient department
vertigo and sleep related neurological discomfort
limb numbness but no sudden weakness
chronic headache and dizziness consultation
neurological symptoms insomnia and tingling

expectations.name: general
queries: unclear mild symptoms cannot decide department
chronic disease follow up and physical exam indicators
multiple light symptoms need first evaluation
general consultation for mixed minor problems
not sure which clinic to choose for routine issue

expectations.name: insurance-materials
queries: what documents should I bring for outpatient visit
do I need ID card and insurance card
materials needed for clinic appointment
child visit requires guardian identity proof
medical insurance electronic certificate materials
outpatient registration document checklist

expectations.name: arrival-flow
queries: what should I do after successful appointment
arrive at hospital check in and get number
where to wait after taking the queue number
appointment arrival process before seeing doctor
what happens if I am late for my visit
follow onsite calling after appointment

expectations.name: cancel-reschedule
queries: how to cancel an appointment before visit
can I reschedule my outpatient appointment
cancel or change booking through online entrance
appointment already checked in can I refund
missed queue number cancellation rule
need to change visit time before hospital arrival

expectations.name: lab-report
queries: how to query lab test report online
doctor ordered examination where should I go
when will inspection report be available
abnormal test result should return to doctor
report result interpretation after examination
medical imaging and laboratory report lookup

expectations.name: safety
queries: chat mentions chest pain should I go emergency
severe breathing trouble during guide conversation
unconscious or convulsions safety reminder
massive bleeding should not use ordinary guide
sudden paralysis needs emergency advice
high risk symptom route for hospital guide

expectations.name: create
queries: what information must be confirmed before creating appointment
need patient department doctor date and time before booking
registration preview before formal order creation
do not create appointment without user confirmation
confirm all required slots before registration
create outpatient booking confirmation rule

expectations.name: query
queries: query appointment availability from real schedule data
do not fabricate doctors remaining slots or fees
schedule MCP should be source for slot query
search doctor availability and outpatient time
remaining appointment slots must come from system
appointment query data boundary

expectations.name: cancel
queries: cancel appointment needs order ownership and confirmation
cannot cancel already completed registration again
repeat cancel request for cancelled order
explain cancellation impact before final confirmation
verify order status before appointment cancellation
registration refund and cancel rule

expectations.name: reschedule
queries: reschedule should confirm original order and new slot
change appointment time while keeping context
new slot unavailable during reschedule
release old slot or lock new slot failure
appointment reschedule workflow rule
rebooking requires checking whether original order can change

expectations.name: boundary
queries: AI must not invent doctor order status or payment result
RAG policy cannot replace structured business data
registration agent must rely on MCP and database result
business boundary for all registration actions
patient identity and real slot data cannot be guessed
general appointment policy for create query cancel and reschedule
